title: Tailored Resume Generator
description: Tailor an existing resume to one specific job description. Faithful lift of the 'tailored-resume-generator' SKILL.md (by ComposioHQ, awesome-claude-skills, Apache-2.0): the six Key Process Steps become a fan-in/fan-out DAG — JD analysis and resume parsing run in parallel and fan into scoring; ATS formatting re-consumes the keywords; strategic recommendations branch off in parallel. Best Practices + Special Guidance are folded into the relevant steps' contracts.

read_jd.name: Read JD
read_jd.does: Parse the JD into role, responsibilities, and requirements.

parse_resume.name: Parse Resume
parse_resume.does: Parse the existing resume into structured history, skills, and bullets.

extract_keywords.name: Extract Keywords
extract_keywords.does: Rank the JD's skills and ATS keywords by priority.

score_bullets.name: Score Bullets
score_bullets.does: Score each resume bullet against the keywords; flag gaps.

rewrite_bullets.name: Rewrite Bullets
rewrite_bullets.does: Rewrite weak bullets with quantified impact — no fabrication.

reorder_format.name: Reorder & Format
reorder_format.does: Reorder by relevance and format ATS-safe.

strategic_recommendations.name: Strategic Recommendations
strategic_recommendations.does: Strengths, gap plan, interview points, and cover-letter hooks.

deliverable.description: A resume tailored to the target JD (resume_after.md), strategic interview-prep recommendations, plus the scoring trace that shows what changed and why.
